title: DOM XSS in Wetty's File Download Toast
summary: A short writeup of CVE-2026-49864, a DOM XSS in Wetty where an attacker-controlled file-download filename was rendered as raw Toastify HTML.

title: Two Findings in Umami's Sessions and Access Codes
summary: A short writeup of two private Umami reports: Redis-backed logout did not revoke sessions, and team access codes/share slugs were generated from predictable random state.

title: Four Findings in Immich's Shared Link and OAuth Flows
summary: A short summary of four Immich issues I reported around shared-link access control, OAuth account linking, plaintext shared-link passwords, and OAuth profile-picture SSRF.

title: Abusing Cloudflare's Automatic Abuse Handling for Website Takedowns
summary: A test against my own Cloudflare-protected free-plan domain showed how bogus abuse reports could turn into an automated malware warning.

title: Breaking OpenPanel's Tenant Isolation
summary: Two pre-auth bugs in OpenPanel main branch: a hardcoded phpMyAdmin SSO token that crosses tenant boundaries to MySQL root, and an SSRF in the preview proxy that reaches RFC1918 and cloud metadata.

title: Four Findings in Algernon 1.17.6 with AI fuzzing
summary: Using Qwen 3.6 35B with a custom harness to find bugs on Algernon web server and finding four pre-auth issues.

title: Patching Alicesoft Games So They Run Outside Japan Time
summary: Some Alicesoft games crash unless your Windows clock is set to JST. This post explains how to patch the affected games so they run correctly in any timezone.

title: How to Report a Vulnerable Driver and Get a CVE
summary: A plain-English walkthrough for beginners - who to report to, how coordinated disclosure works, and how to request a CVE number from MITRE.

title: Hello World
summary: First post - who I am, why this blog exists, and what to expect.
